segments.text: All these years I have been waiting for this day.
We are now on the 21st Shastrara, so it is a very important turning point as you know
that every twenty-first day we change our calendars as far
And so now, there's a new change has to come
and you can see an announcement
An awareness of very new dimension
So for dealing with collective consciousness
part and parcel of the whole
have developed in those twenty-one years within yourself.
Last two months Italy was burning with fire, it is so very hot and I read reports that
they are worried about the droughts – they want rain to come here but now think time
Because all pervading power knows everything and whole nature works for your benefit
for your programs. At the right time things happen as you have seen before, they are completely
coordinated with our programs all that I am there helping whatever
They are using them at the right time.
Now be confident that you have powers and this is a new change which will come within
your own understanding, so far only You knew we could feel the vibrations – that
You could cure people, you could help to cure, I mean still not so confident that
But it did know what dynamic forces are working in you now
and this is a new change which will come
With these changes we have to assume
And The New Character is Announcement
So far I told you not to talk about Sahaja Yoga very openly, blatantly but now the time
We waited long for these days and we have all started talking about it announcing
about is telling everyone otherwise world would say that never knew
it. All other false gurus are so well known all over, because their disciples
were talking about them in places wherever they can to all the big
offices that go and people who just tell what
So far we had kept Sahaja Yoga at a low ebb
Because I wanted you, first of all to develop into really very beautiful Sahaja Yogis so
that from your life – form your lifestyle.
From the behavior and understanding…from thoughts people will realize these are unique
A very different type of people.
Now that assumption has to be there, you have to understand all these powers are bubbling
in and just out formality or maybe out shyness a little cowardice ,you're hiding them.
The other day there was a Sahaja Yogi who came to My house and he saw some flowers which
I said, they're not fading you can give them life!
You cut the bottom of all these and put your hand underneath – what book has he
And he just put his hands under the base of the stem, and He said,"Mother they are still
His attention was here an there within fifteen days
They stood up alright, started growing
and lasted for five more after that
You can do so many things
to convince yourself that you have these powers.
I've seen people who has certain problems,
and this or the other, then come to Me
when mother has to cure her head ache
So now we are in a Royal Court
Now the days are gone when you had to sit and count your blessings, now
You have to count Your powers
How many powers I am and what i Can use And how
We Have Had Enough Miracles To Prove that you're Sahaja Yogis
and that you are held by the Paramchaitanya.
But now know how much of
And how Your'e gonna work out
for your families, nor for you communities – not
or country but the whole world. Expand yourself!
You must have that vision before
That you have to emancipate humanity
should think we are very ordinary
haven got something special about it
This work is not going to be done by special people because they are suffering from ego.
It's gonna do it with the people who don't have that ego of great success or of great
achievements, riches and anything else – if you get rid off this then only we can work
And thats why its for your understanding what Christ has said that a camel can pass
through the whole of a needle but not a rich man, because their ego is too big – bigger
than camel or an elephant. Any animal you could think on! That's why now as we are
entering into new awareness let us don't worry about our negative thinking so first
is the defiance. How can I be, ''I'm not all right,'' ''I was like this,'',
''I wasn't doing it like that.'' So many letters of confessions come to Me pages
after page which are thrown away or burned them off." There's no need
confess anymore there only one confession
That I am a Sahaja Yogi and now
This is the confession you have to make.
And no more of all these out-of date things that people tell Me about your family's
life, and mundane nonsensical thing – we've given them up!
We came into Sahaja Yoga for our ascent…
And now for what, have achieved our ascent is to emancipate human beings and help them
out of the mire ignorance or darkness.
The main target I feel today should not be so much political as fundamentalism
So we need openly say this fundamentalist that you are nonsensical
You don't know the truth, you do not know anything about truth.
We dont' that we are spirit and there is a power that it's working
.You have to tell them very clearly
,you're all stupid people running after something
And I love you will end up into hell as described by other scriptures
to say that running after falsehood is not going
take you to God. And in
That they have used the power of hatred
So, You Have To Say We Believe In The Power Of Love
and Not In The Power Of Hatred
of that paradise which is promised to us, the Kingdom

We should enter into his kingdom
If you take a positive attitude

kinda for things especially after Sahaja Yoga.

just got attach your family like glued them absolutely glue I had solve everybody's

what is a Sahaja Yoga marriage and there are still some problems, very few but they're
So this nonsensical problem of my family – My wife ,My children .My house ..my property

person who's king does not belongs his kingdom it'a failure its useless if he
thinks about himself, about his own comforts ,about his own fame and achievements then he

also turn your mind away from all these petty things that I've been struggling
with trying help for every small little nonsensical thing and many people said
Mother, why should you worry? You are a saint. Why should you worry about these things?"
I said unless and until this entanglements have taken away they're not going to come on
but now –now–you do feel that freedom complete freedom
And the source of joy is your Spirit
We' re no entangled with anyone
we aren't anyway attached to any one
you are going to nourish everyone, inclusive of so-called your family ,your people
Your country and ultimately the world.
So...to get rid off negativity first important thing is
When we look at anyone or start thinking about anyone
Get into a state of thoughtlessness
Immediately you'll feel detached and will know the solution of your whole problem.
Now,the greatest power that is in our brain – that we are knowledgeable!
Not knowledgeable by understanding what is the chakra or center but there's all

You know so many people who've never been speaking on stage – they had stage fear

little pleasures here and there but the main thing is
How Many People We Give Realization To?
Whether you're a woman whether your man

How much you can announce about Sahaja Yoga? That's the main thing!

such prime things from them suddenly became
By The Way so Sahaja Yoga

Is on The Kite! There are ladies who do all household work

All Her attention is On The Child

is in balance In same way your attention should be all
time on Sahaja Yoga what happening in Sahajyoga where we going ? Where his mother?
what part she's, what is She doing? That is now if you put your attention to
